ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Patient's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Patient's last name */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Patient's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Patient's gender (e.g., Male, Female, Other) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Patient's contact email */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Patient's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Patient's address */,
  "date_registered" TEXT /* Date the patient was registered in the system */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Patient's insurance provider */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "next_of_kin" TEXT /* Relationship of the emergency contact to the patient (e.g., Spouse, Parent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "medical_condition" TEXT /* Medical condition of the patient */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date the condition was diagnosed */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment provided for the condition */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Allergies the patient has */,
  "medications" TEXT /* Medications the patient is currently taking */,
  "surgical_history" TEXT /* History of any surgeries the patient has undergone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lifestyle_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifestyle factor entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Current smoking status (e.g., Non-smoker, Smoker) */,
  "smoking_history" TEXT /* Smoking history (e.g., Never, Former, Current) */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Dietary habits (e.g., Balanced, High-sugar) */,
  "exercise_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of exercise (e.g., Daily, Weekly) */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* Alcohol consumption (e.g., Social, Regular) */,
  "stress_level" TEXT /* Patient's stress level (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "sleep_quality" TEXT /* Patient's sleep quality (e.g., Poor, Fair, Good, Excellent) */,
  "oral_hygiene_habits" TEXT /* Patient's oral hygiene habits (e.g., Flosses daily, Flosses weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lifestyle_factors_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "periodontal_exams" (
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each periodontal examination */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the examination */,
  "exam_type" TEXT /* Type of examination (e.g., Baseline, Re-evaluation) */,
  "exam_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "exam_location" TEXT /* Location where the examination was conducted (e.g., Clinic A, Clinic B) */,
  "exam_conducted_by" TEXT /* Name of the dentist or healthcare provider who conducted the exam */,
  "exam_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the examination in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_periodontal_exams_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pocket_depths" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pocket depth measurement */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the periodontal examination */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the measurement was taken */,
  "pocket_depth" REAL /* Depth of the periodontal pocket in millimeters */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the pocket depth (e.g., Probe, Ultrasound) */,
  "measurement_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the measurement (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pocket_depths_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pocket_depths_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES periodontal_exams ("exam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site (e.g., Tooth 1, Tooth 2) */,
  "site_description" TEXT /* Description of the site (e.g., Upper right, Lower left) */,
  "tooth_number" INTEGER /* Number of the tooth (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  "tooth_position" TEXT /* Position of the tooth (e.g., Upper, Lower, Left, Right) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_records" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "treatment_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment was provided */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment (e.g., Scaling, Root Planing) */,
  "treatment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "treatment_location" TEXT /* Location where the treatment was provided (e.g., Clinic A, Clinic B) */,
  "treatment_conducted_by" TEXT /* Name of the dentist or healthcare provider who provided the treatment */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of the next follow-up appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the study */,
  "study_description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "study_status" TEXT /* Current status of the study (e.g., Active, Completed, On Hold) */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study (e.g., Grant, Sponsorship) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study participation */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research study */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "participation_date" TEXT /* Date the patient joined the study */,
  "participation_status" TEXT /* Participation status (e.g., Active, Completed, Withdrawn) */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date the patient gave consent to participate in the study */,
  "withdrawal_reason" TEXT /* Reason for withdrawal if the patient withdrew from the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_participants_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES research_studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_participants_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Dentist, Researcher, Admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the user within the organization (e.g., Senior Dentist, Junior Researcher) */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the user was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient (if applicable) */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study (if applicable) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES research_studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
